title: Claw Artifact Bundle — trace.jsonl line
description: Schema for one line (JSON object) in a claw's trace.jsonl. Each line records a single meaningful action in chronological order.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the event.

oneOf.title: source_opened
oneOf.description: Emitted when the claw opens or fetches a source for reading.

path.description: File path or URL path within the source.

oneOf.title: claim_extracted
oneOf.description: Emitted when the claw extracts a claim for evidence.jsonl.

claim_id.description: The id value of the claim in evidence.jsonl.

source.description: Source key or URL the claim was drawn from.

oneOf.title: tool_called
oneOf.description: Emitted when the claw invokes a tool.

input.description: Key inputs passed to the tool. May be omitted or redacted for sensitive tools.

oneOf.title: file_modified
oneOf.description: Emitted when the claw writes or modifies a file (builder/reviewer claws).

path.description: File path relative to the worktree root.

oneOf.title: error
oneOf.description: Emitted when a recoverable or non-recoverable error occurs.

recoverable.description: Whether the claw continued after the error.

tool.description: Tool that caused the error, if applicable.

oneOf.title: finished
oneOf.description: Always the last event. Summarises the run outcome.

claims_count.description: Number of claims written to evidence.jsonl.
